Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given an event log and a set of normative constraints and desiderata

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Part 1 Normative Process Behavior Strict Rules Key Constraints Sequence Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Inform Applicant If Approved Finalize Documentation Close Case Ordering Rules 1 Credit Check must occur before Risk Assessment 2 Risk Assessment must occur before Loan Decision 3 Inform Applicant must occur after Loan Decision 4 If loan is approved Finalize Documentation must occur before Close Case 5 If loan is rejected do not finalize documentation before closing the case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Part 2 Desiderata Recommended but Not Strict Credit Check should be completed within 24 hours of Application Received Inform Applicant should be within 48 hours of Loan Decision Follow up Call is encouraged but not required and it should be before closing

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Step 1 Identify violating normative rules Lets analyze each case

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1 Timeline 2024 01 10 09 00 Application Received 2024 01 10 09 30 Credit Check 2024 01 10 10 00 Risk Assessment 2024 01 10 11 00 Loan Decision Approved 2024 01 10 13 00 Inform Applicant 2024 01 10 13 30 Finalize Documentation 2024 01 10 14 00 Close Case Check the sequence and rules Application Received to Credit Check OK Credit Check 09 30 before Risk Assessment 10 00 OK Risk Assessment 10 00 before Loan Decision 11 00 OK Loan Decision 11 00 then Inform Applicant 13 00 OK Approved then Finalize Documentation 13 30 and then Close Case 14 00 OK No violation of normative rules

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 2 Timeline 2024 01 11 08 00 Application Received 2024 01 11 08 20 Risk Assessment Problem Risk Assessment without a prior Credit Check violates rule Credit Check must be before Risk Assessment 2024 01 11 09 00 Credit Check This is after Risk Assessment which is not allowed 2024 01 11 09 30 Loan Decision Rejected 2024 01 11 10 00 Finalize Documentation Problem For rejection we should not finalize documentation violates rule if rejected do not finalize documentation 2024 01 11 10 30 Close Case Violations of normative rules 1 The process did Risk Assessment before Credit Check should be the other way around 2 After a rejection the process performed Finalize Documentation which is not allowed

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 3 Timeline 2024 01 12 09 00 Application Received 2024 01 14 10 00 Credit Check Note 2 days later which is a desideratum issue not normative 2024 01 14 11 00 Risk Assessment 2024 01 14 12 00 Loan Decision Approved 2024 01 16 15 00 Inform Applicant Note 2 days and 3 hours after loan decision which is a desideratum issue 2024 01 17 09 00 Finalize Documentation 2024 01 17 10 00 Close Case Check the sequence and rules Application Received to Credit Check OK even though late normative rule does not require a time constraint Credit Check 10 00 on 14th before Risk Assessment 11 00 on 14th OK Risk Assessment 11 00 before Loan Decision 12 00 OK Loan Decision 12 00 on 14th then Inform Applicant 15 00 on 16th OK though late not a normative violation Approved then Finalize Documentation 09 00 on 17th and then Close Case 10 00 on 17th OK No violation of normative rules

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Conclusion for normative violations Case 1 No normative violations Case 2 Two normative violations 1 Risk Assessment occurred before Credit Check order violation 2 Finalize Documentation was performed after a rejection contradictory action Case 3 No normative violations

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Case 2 Inform Applicant Not applicable because the loan was rejected and then they closed the case without informing Actually the log shows Inform Applicant is not present for Case 2 But note the normative rule requires that after the loan decision whether approved or rejected we must inform the applicant The log for Case 2 does not have an Inform Applicant event at all This is a serious normative violation because the rule says Inform Applicant must occur after Loan Decision However the event log for Case 2 does have an Inform Applicant event Let me check

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Looking at the event log for Case 2 There is no Inform Applicant event This is a normative violation which I initially missed But note the problem says that the normative rules require that after the loan decision the applicant must be informed So the absence of Inform Applicant is a normative violation

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Therefore Case 2 has three normative violations 1 Risk Assessment before Credit Check order violation 2 Missing Inform Applicant after loan decision skipping 3 Finalize Documentation after rejection contradictory action

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1 Desiderata Credit Check 2024 01 10 09 00 Application Received to 09 30 same day within 1 5 hours within 24 hours so OK Inform Applicant 2024 01 10 11 00 Loan Decision to 13 00 same day 2 hours within 48 hours so OK Follow up Call Not present in the log for Case 1 This is a desideratum violation should have been done but it is not required

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 2 Desiderata Credit Check within 24 hours OK Inform Applicant This event is missing and is a normative violation so we do not consider the timing under desiderata Follow up Call Not present desideratum violation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 3 Desiderata violations Credit Check Took 2 days exceeding 24 hours recommendation Inform Applicant Took 2 days and 3 hours exceeding 48 hours recommendation No Follow up Call

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 1 The process was followed correctly regarding normative rules The only issue is the missing Follow up Call which might be due to oversight or prioritization of other tasks However it is not a critical issue

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 2 The normative violations are serious and indicate a breakdown in the process The out of order processing Risk Assessment before Credit Check might be due to a misunderstanding of the process or an attempt to expedite the process by starting the risk assessment without waiting for the credit check However this is incorrect and violates the rules The missing Inform Applicant step is a critical failure This might be an oversight or a system error Finalizing documentation for a rejected loan is also a mistake which might be due to a system error or human error

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 3 The desiderata violations delays in Credit Check and Informing and no Follow up Call might be due to workload constraints staff shortages or system delays The process still followed the required sequence but timing and the optional Follow up Call were not met

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Summary Table Case 1 Normative Violations None Desiderata Violations No Follow up Call Case 2 Normative Violations Yes 3 violations Desiderata Violations No Follow up Call Case 3 Normative Violations None Desiderata Violations Credit Check delay Inform Applicant delay No Follow up Call
